an1.402-405:1.0.1: " … (402) dwells contemplating the body in the body,ardent, clearly comprehending, mindful, having removed longing and dejection in regard to the world … (403) dwells contemplating feelings in feelings … (404) dwells contemplating mind in mind … (405) dwells contemplating phenomena in phenomena, ardent, clearly comprehending, mindful, having removed longing and dejection in regard to the world … "
